tasks.title: Implement ResolveSection helper
tasks.acceptance: ResolveSection in engine/resolve_section.go returns (resolved, ambiguous, candidates) per spec rules. Handles canonical match, plain-text single match, ambiguous level conflict, no match, trims whitespace, empty input.
tasks.closed_reason: ResolveSection in engine/resolve_section.go returns canonical/ambiguous/candidates per spec rules. Plain text resolves to canonical when unambiguous; canonical input verified against spec; whitespace trimmed; empty input returns zero. SuggestSimilarSections uses Levenshtein distance for did-you-mean. Build green; engine tests pass.

tasks.title: Unit tests for ResolveSection
tasks.acceptance: engine/resolve_section_test.go has 7 tests: canonical exact, plain unique, plain ambiguous, no match, whitespace trim, empty input, suggestion typo. All pass.
tasks.closed_reason: engine/resolve_section_test.go covers all 7 spec scenarios plus 2 typo/no-match suggestion tests. go test ./internal/engine/ green.

tasks.title: AutoFillCoverage uses ResolveSection
tasks.acceptance: engine/coverage.go AutoFillCoverage resolves each source_sections entry via ResolveSection so plain-text values map correctly to mapped_sections. Example resolution table from spec verified.
tasks.closed_reason: engine/coverage.go AutoFillCoverage now resolves each source_sections entry via ResolveSection. Plain-text and canonical inputs both map to canonical headings; ambiguous/unresolvable entries skipped. Example resolution table verified by engine tests.

tasks.title: Improved coverage error messages
tasks.acceptance: ValidateCoverage error for unresolvable source_sections includes 'Expected canonical format' line + up to 3 did-you-mean candidates via engine/suggest.go. Ambiguous case emits dedicated message listing candidates.
tasks.closed_reason: ValidateCoverage rewrites coverage error path: ambiguous entries list candidates + canonical disambiguation hint; unresolvable entries name expected format + up to 3 Levenshtein suggestions via SuggestSimilarSections. All existing tests pass.

tasks.title: tp import auto-normalizes source_sections
tasks.acceptance: tp import resolves each task source_sections entry to canonical form before persisting. Ambiguous entry aborts import with exit 1 listing candidates. Unresolvable entries pass through (validation catches).
tasks.closed_reason: tp import calls engine.NormalizeSourceSections after parsing spec headings. Plain-text 1. Setup persisted as ## 1. Setup; canonical kept as-is; ambiguous (e.g. Setup matching ## Setup and ### Setup) aborts import with exit 1 and quoted candidates list. QA verified: 2-task spec round-trip, ambiguity rejection, did-you-mean for typo via validation.

tasks.title: tp add applies same normalization
tasks.acceptance: tp add applies ResolveSection normalization to source_sections matching tp import behavior (P2 batch parity).
tasks.closed_reason: tp add normalizes the single task source_sections via NormalizeSourceSections before append, matching tp import behavior. Same ambiguity guard applies.

tasks.title: CLI integration tests for normalization
tasks.acceptance: Integration tests cover: import plain-text persists canonical; import ambiguous fails with candidates; mixed plain/canonical normalized; validate did-you-mean; tp add normalize; lint heading output unchanged.
tasks.closed_reason: 7 integration tests in internal/cli/import_normalize_test.go cover all spec acceptance scenarios: plain-text normalization, canonical round-trip, mixed format, ambiguous abort with quoted candidates, unresolvable did-you-mean, tp add parity, and lint heading backward compat. All pass.

tasks.title: SKILL.md source_sections + context_only docs
tasks.acceptance: skills/tp/SKILL.md has new subsection documenting source_sections canonical format (## prefix + text) with lenient acceptance note, and a subsection explaining context_only vs unmapped semantics.
tasks.closed_reason: skills/tp/SKILL.md adds 'source_sections format' subsection (canonical ## prefix + text, lenient v0.22.0+ acceptance, lint output note) and 'Coverage block: context_only vs unmapped' subsection (mapped/context_only/unmapped semantics + arithmetic invariant).

tasks.title: CLAUDE.md self-development rule for source_sections
tasks.acceptance: CLAUDE.md Self-Development Rules mention canonical source_sections format requirement and v0.22.0 lenient acceptance.

tasks.title: README.md source_sections format note
tasks.acceptance: README.md mentions canonical source_sections form near existing examples and notes lenient acceptance.
